children.text: The High-Protein Diet is right for you!
Increase your daily protein intake to optimize muscle growth and burn fat. The basics include lean meat, fish and legumes as well as soy and dairy products.
You can only start this plan with PRO.
The recommended nutrient ratio based on your current weight and calorie goal. You can adjust the ratio in the settings at any time.
You will get delicious recipe ideas for breakfast, lunch and dinner based on this plan on a daily basis. All of our recipes have also been prepared and cooked by our nutritionists.
The High-Protein Diet is not only suitable for athletes, but also for those who want to get rid of a few pounds.
A large portion of protein satisfies me for several hours and I have significantly fewer cravings. Now, I find it a lot easier to live without candy.

With the High-Protein Diet, you will eat mostly protein-rich foods. Main items on the menu will include meat, fish, eggs, soy and milk products. At the same time, you will limit your consumption of carbohydrates. A conscious amount of healthy fats round off the menu.

In addition to animal proteins, your portions should also include a few plant-based protein suppliers like legumes, nuts, soy or lupines - this way the biological value is optimally utilized. The biological value indicates how much protein can be converted into endogenous protein (muscles).

With the high-protein nutritional plan, you can optimize fat burning and maintain muscle mass as well as support muscle building. This form of nutrition is not only suitable for athletes, but for those who want to shed a few pounds, too.

Since protein-rich diets keep you full, you won't have to worry about being hungry or overeating. This way, you can maintain your nutritional plan for a longer period of time. This is great when looking to reduce weight, for example.
